name: A New Day - A Mafia's Son
description:
Art by Ama_imakuma on Twitter.

"Do you really have to go?"

"Yes."

"Tonight?"

"Tonight."

"But… you just got home."

"I know."

"I thought you would stay longer this time."

"I wanted to. More than anything."

"Then… can’t you?"

"It’s not that simple."

"I don’t understand…"

"One day, you will."

"But… what if you don’t come back?"

"I will."

"How do you know?"

"Because I have to. Because you’re waiting for me."

"But what if something happens?"

"Then you’ll have to be strong."

"I don’t think I can."

"You can. You’re stronger than you think."

"I don’t want to be strong. I just want you here."

"I know."

"Will it be a long time before I see you again?"

"I hope not."

"That’s not a promise."

"No. It isn’t."

"…"

"Come here."

"…I’ll wait. I’ll wait as long as it takes."

"You won’t have to wait forever."

"You always say that."

"And I always mean it."

"Then… just promise me one thing."

"Anything."

"Promise you’ll try. No matter what."

"I promise."

"…Okay."

"Goodbye."
